The following courses are suggested electives:

BMGT110 Introduction to the Business Value Chain

BMGT220 Principles of Accounting I

BMGT364 Managing People and Organizations 1

COMM200 Critical Thinking and Speaking 1

2 Fermentation Science Major

NFSC498 Selected Topics

1 High-demand course. For non-major students, these seats are assigned as "ﬁrst-come, ﬁrst-served". Students are encouraged to register as early as possible for a seat in these courses.
